rulings.Case Title: DAVID BARNETT VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder To Deft Paccar Inc.'S Motion To Dismiss Or, In The Alternative, Stay Action On The Ground Of Forum Non Conveniens
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, December 23, 2008, line 1. DEFENDANT FOSTER WHEELER LLC'S Joinder To Defendant Paccar Inc's Motion To Dismiss Or, In The Alternative, Stay Action On The Ground Of Forum Non Conveniens is granted. =(302/PJM/JW)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID BARNETT VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Paccar Inc.¿S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Or Stay Action On The Grounds Of Forum Non Conveniens
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, December 23, 2008, line 1. DEFENDANT PACCAR INC'S Motion To Dismiss Or Stay Action On The Grounds Of Forum Non Conveniens. The motion to stay is granted. Defendant's showing is consistent with the holding in Morris v. AGFA (2006) 144 Cal. App. 4th 1452. California is a seriously inconvenient forum. Most, if not all of the defendants may be sued in Alabama. =(302/PJM/JW)

rulings.Case Title: FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-08-480768 WITH CASE CGC-08-477064
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, December 23, 2008, line 10. PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES' MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-08-480768 WITH CASE CGC-08-477064 is granted. Given that the same project is involved, it makes sense to consolidate the cases for all purposes. At trial, the trial judge can determine how to try the different issues. =(302/PJM/PB)
